title: SAP India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: SAP India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? SAP India Capital India in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
